svg.title: Fibonacci Growth-Convergence Compass
svg.desc: Three coordinated discrete panels: logarithmic positive destination growth for Fv 0 through Fv 28 with Fv -1 identified as the excluded zero seed, forward-ratio convergence toward phi, and log-scale absolute ratio-error shrinkage with sign color. Uses repository Fv convention. Finite ratios are not equal to phi; nature and geometry labels are evidence-boundary topics, not proof of mechanisms.
svg.text: One local additive rule → accumulating integer scale → adjacent ratios converge toward φ → power-scale growth emerges
A. Exact destinations on log scale
B. Forward ratios zigzag toward φ
Fv process step v (0..28 shown; Fv -1 = 0 excluded from log axis)
Ratio step v for R_v = D_v / D_(v-1)
Below/above alternation is visible; finite points never equal φ
Step v; vertical scale is log10(|R_v - φ|)
Magnitude shrinks; red/blue markers encode above/below φ
Observation ribbon: how the twelve essay topics fit together
Data lineage: recurrence-computed canonical Fv destinations through Fv 28. Discrete markers are observations; connecting segments show order only, not continuous Fibonacci states.
